raw.message: Doomsday is here. Rescue survivors, join them in fighting zombies, and survive to the end.

hook.summary: A survivor accidentally alerts a group of zombie nurses in a dark hospital hallway.
hook.visual_action: A woman sneaking through a dark room kicks a red soda can, causing it to clatter and alert nearby zombies.

scene_flow: Cinematic 3D render of a survivor sneaking past zombie nurses in a dark hospital.
The survivor accidentally kicks a soda can, alerting the zombies who then attack.
Top-down gameplay showing the player dragging and dropping defensive structures to build a base.
A montage of the base expanding with gardens, tents, and fortified walls.
Final shot of the base being swarmed by zombies followed by the game's logo and CTA.
audience_proxy: Fans of zombie survival and base-building strategy games who enjoy tactical defense.
